data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Utilizes a microservices architecture to handle different functionalities such as video streaming, recommendations, and ads separately.
data.technical_spec: Services are developed, deployed, and scaled independently.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Leverages a global CDN to distribute video content efficiently across different regions.
data.technical_spec: Uses edge servers to cache video content closer to end-users.

data.title: Scalable Storage System
data.description: Employs a distributed storage system to manage vast amounts of video data and user-generated content.
data.technical_spec: Supports horizontal scaling and high availability.

data.title: Data Processing Pipeline
data.description: Utilizes streaming and batch data processing for analytics and recommendation systems.
data.technical_spec: Integrates tools like Apache Kafka and Hadoop for data handling.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements load balancing strategies to efficiently distribute incoming traffic across servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses both hardware and software-based load balancers.
